src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Replace deprecated Guava `Lists.newArrayList()` with standard Java `LinkedList` to remove external dependency usage for list creation.
Introduce Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for constructors, getters, and logging.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: Added @NoArgsConstructor, @Getter, @AllArgsConstructor to class and inner class

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Rename methods to use more precise terminology (instance vs server) and consistent naming conventions.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: start() -> doStart(), stop() -> doStop(), redisReadyPattern() -> redisInstanceReadyPattern()

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Simplify constructor logic by removing port tracking and initializing arguments directly.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: Removed port-specific constructors, added single constructor taking List<String> args

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Update imports to reflect the removal of Guava and addition of Lombok.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/IRedisServe.general_idea: Updated imports to reflect the change from List to Set in the interface.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/IRedisServe.human_impl: Removed import java.util.List; Added import java.util.Set;

src/main/java/redis/embedded/IRedisServe.general_idea: Adjusted indentation of interface methods to use 4 spaces instead of 2.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunch..general_idea: Replace imperative for-loops with Java Stream API calls for cleaner iteration logic.
Utilize parallel streams for start/stop operations to potentially improve concurrency performance.
Use LinkedHashSet to maintain insertion order while ensuring uniqueness in port collections.
Remove unused ArrayList import as it is replaced by LinkedHashSet.
Reorganize import statements to group standard library and project-specific imports.
Adjust code indentation to use 4 spaces consistently.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunch..human_impl: private final List<RedisSentinel> redisSentinels = new LinkedList<>();

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunchB.general_idea: Add @NoArgsConstructor annotation to reduce boilerplate constructor code.
Change internal slave ports storage from List to Set to prevent duplicate ports.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunchB.human_impl: private final Set<Integer> slavePorts = new LinkedHashSet<>();

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunchB.general_idea: Replace traditional for-loops with Java 8+ forEach streams for cleaner code.
Refactor buildSlaves to return a List instead of mutating an external list.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCliExe.general_idea: Add executable mappings for ARM64 architectures on Unix and macOS to support Apple Silicon and other ARM-based systems.
Replace generic macOS executable constant with specific AMD64 constant to align with the new architecture-specific approach.
Remove the 32-bit x86 Unix executable mapping as it is likely deprecated or no longer supported in the target environment.
Remove the 32-bit x86 macOS executable mapping as it is no longer relevant for modern macOS versions.
Reorder class members to place the private constructor before the static factory method for better code organization.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCliExe.human_impl: moved private RedisCliExecProvider() constructor above public static RedisCliExecProvider defaultProvider()

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.general_idea: Refactor RedisClient to extend AbstractRedisClientInstance instead of implementing IRedisClient to leverage shared base functionality.
Remove large blocks of commented-out legacy implementation code that are no longer needed.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.human_impl: Removed ~100 lines of commented-out code including run(), stop(), and helper methods.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.general_idea: Add a constructor to pass arguments to the new parent class.
Introduce a static builder factory method for creating instances.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.human_impl: public static RedisClientBuilder builder() { return new RedisClientBuilder(); }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.general_idea: Implement the required abstract method from the new parent class to define the ready pattern.
Remove unused imports and add necessary ones for the refactored class structure.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.human_impl: Removed java.util.Collections, java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService, etc.; kept java.util.List.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Replace imperative for-loops with Java Stream API for isActive, start, and stop methods.
Remove unused ArrayList import as it is no longer used in the ports() method.
Add Set import to support the new return type of ports().
Add LinkedHashSet import to support the new implementation of ports().
Introduce Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for logging and constructor generation.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Added @Slf4j and @NoArgsConstructor annotations to the class.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.general_idea: Replace the for-each loop iterating over Architecture values with a Java 8+ Stream API call for modern syntax.
Extract the error message string into a variable to avoid repeating the concatenation logic for logging and exception throwing.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.human_impl: String msg = "No Redis executable found for " + osArch;

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.general_idea: Add the java.util.Arrays import required for the new stream-based iteration.
Adjust code indentation and spacing to conform to updated coding standards.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.human_impl: Changed indentation from 2 spaces to 4 spaces for method bodies.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.general_idea: Renamed the constant holding the ready pattern to be more descriptive.
Removed unused imports and added necessary ones for the new implementation.
